sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3733" key="a)kthri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκτηρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n3733.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">staff</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n3733.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bar of wood</tr_> supporting chariot-pole, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.157</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
